text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Summer! Ocean!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some time now, Matikanetannhauser has been
training harder than usual with her sights set on
winning the Kikuka Sho. On one such day...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: A million thanks!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Director?! Um, to what do I owe this sudden
pleasure?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa has come to visit
Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You should know that the average number of
applications for our next open campus have
increased by thirty percent following the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The reasons are numerous, of course! However, I
have no doubt that your efforts have played a
major factor!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I've seen many applicants state in their
essays that your positive demeanor in the
Japanese Derby gave them courage!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What? No, no, no, no! That's definitely got to be
some kind of coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I mean, I've given it some thought, but... why me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong. I'm very happy to hear it, of
course! Really, really happy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But if you want an Umamusume who can guide
others, what about Bourbon? Or Rice?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There are so many people better suited to that
kind of thing than I am...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see. I thought it would dawn on you as you
raced!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: It seems you are still unaware of your potential!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I am?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa loudly clears her throat before
facing Matikanetannhauser again.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
It isn't your race record that has drawn my
attention!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
If anything, you're a perfectly ordinary
Umamusume at a glance! But that's precisely what
makes you unique!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Being ordinary makes me... unique?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Unaware are we? With just a single word, you
inspire others to keep their heads up high!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Though... I could probably stand to learn a thing
or two from you.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: It's because you're you they're so inspired!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I want you to believe in that power more than
anyone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, um... Well! I guess I wouldn't say that I'm
completely unaware...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm just not sure that I'm an inspiration to
anyone... Though, I mean... I suppose...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I really do have the potential to inspire
people...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've been all restless ever since the director said
that stuff to me yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Is there some kind of training that can help me
get rid of this feeling?
choice_data_list: Get buff by swimming a lap around an island!

Try running as much as you can to focus your
mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Understood! Off I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, Matikanetannhauser leaps into
the ocean and swims far into the distance in the
blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Focus my mind, huh?! Okay, I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Matikanetannhauser runs across the
beach and far into the distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's rare for her to become flustered like
this—she's usually so unperturbed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps Director Akikawa's expectations have
stirred something within her.
